query:
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS logoCache (
  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  ticker VARCHAR(50) NOT NULL UNIQUE,
  logoUrl VARCHAR(1000),
  source VARCHAR(50) NOT NULL DEFAULT 'eodhd',
  lastFetched TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP NOT NULL,
  expiresAt TIMESTAMP NULL,
  createdAt TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP NOT NULL,
  updatedAt TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP NOT NULL,
  INDEX ix_logo_cache_ticker (ticker)
);
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 2w4G5FWonHi6U6L.root --database aQvizP6Ne8LKEmBGrk5vq4 --execute CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS logoCache (
  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  ticker VARCHAR(50) NOT NULL UNIQUE,
  logoUrl VARCHAR(1000),
  source VARCHAR(50) NOT NULL DEFAULT 'eodhd',
  lastFetched TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP NOT NULL,
  expiresAt TIMESTAMP NULL,
  createdAt TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP NOT NULL,
  updatedAt TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP NOT NULL,
  INDEX ix_logo_cache_ticker (ticker)
);
